name: ColumnCountExtension
title: Number of columns for child item layout
description: For questions with a set of options, indicates the number of columns across which those choices should be organized. E.g., 2 columns, 5 columns, etc.

element.definition: For questions with a set of options, indicates the number of columns across which those choices should be organized. E.g., 2 columns, 5 columns, etc.
element.comment: Systems will split the options to maintain balance across the columns. Whether the choices are listed horizontally first or vertically first depends on the choice-orientation extension. Default is vertically first. Note that the number of columns is a recommendation and may not be achievable in all display form factors.
